    Course Builder

    Build your own course builder app

    Create a fully functional course builder app in minutes. Turn your requirements into working software without writing a single line of code.

    From concept to creation with Base44

    Build custom course builder apps with AI that fit your exact workflow. Get a tailored solution without the heavy lifting.

    Build with a simple prompt

    Bring your ideas to life using natural language. Simply describe the workflow you need, and get a ready-to-use solution instantly.

    Brainstorm while you build

    Collaborate with Base44 AI to explore features and refine your app in real-time. Test ideas and evolve your product dynamically as you create it.

    Publish with one click

    Publishing your course builder app is as simple as hitting a button. Your app is hosted and ready to share immediately, or you can connect a custom domain in seconds.

    Backend power included

    Your course builder app comes with a robust backend built-in. With auth, user management, and storage ready from day one, you can focus entirely on your users.

    Automate and scale

    Enable built-in AI assistants to handle repetitive work. Connect tools, trigger actions, and automate workflows effortlessly, giving you more time to grow.

    Seamless integration for your app ecosystem

    Your course builder app needs to work with your world. Base44 lets you connect to the tools you already use:

    View all integrations

    Monday.com

    Seamlessly manage course projects and workflows with Monday.com, enhancing collaboration and tracking.

    HubSpot

    Sync your courses with HubSpot to streamline marketing efforts and improve student engagement.

    Slack

    Utilize Slack for real-time notifications and team collaboration, ensuring everyone stays updated on course progress.

    Zapier

    Automate course management tasks with Zapier, connecting with over 6,000 apps to enhance efficiency.

    Want to see a new integration? Tell us what to add next

    Add Request

    How to build your own course builder app

    Describe your needs

    Tell Base44 what you want your app to do. For course builder apps, you might describe how you'll create, manage, and organize courses for your users.

    0

    1

    Generate your app

    Base44 AI builds your app from your description. You'll get a course builder app that includes features for course creation, user management, and tracking progress.

    0

    2

    Customize the design

    Refine your app's look and features to match your vision. Customize layouts, branding, and course templates to fit how you want to deliver your courses.

    0

    3

    Enable AI features

    Add smart assistants and automation to your app. Enable AI agents that can recommend course content, personalize learning paths, and analyze user engagement.

    0

    4

    Launch your app

    Deploy your app and share it with your audience. Your course builder app goes live instantly, so you can start creating and managing courses for your users right away.

    0

    5

    Prompting your course builder app

    Phase

    1

    Project Setup

    Why this matters:

    Establishes the foundational structure for the Course Builder application.

    Create a Course Builder app with user authentication, course catalog management, and student enrollment features

    txtCopied

    Why this matters:

    Provides instructors with a comprehensive interface to oversee their courses.

    Add a dashboard for instructors to manage courses, view student progress, and access analytics

    txtCopied

    Phase

    2

    Core & Advanced Features

    Why this matters:

    Enhances learning experience with multimedia content and assessments.

    Integrate video hosting for course lectures with playback tracking and quiz features at the end of each module

    txtCopied

    Why this matters:

    Fosters community engagement and collaboration among learners.

    Add a discussion forum for each course where students can ask questions and share insights

    txtCopied

    Phase

    3

    Polish & Deploy

    Why this matters:

    Ensures the app reflects your brand identity for a cohesive look.

    Customize the app's UI with our branding colors (#FF5733 for accents, #FFFFFF for background) and logo

    txtCopied

    Why this matters:

    Automates student communication and enhances course engagement.

    Set up automated emails for course completion certificates and reminders for upcoming classes

    txtCopied

    Trusted by 2M+ users

    Frequently asked questions

    How do I build course builder apps with AI?

    Absolutely! With Base44, you can build full-stack course builder apps using plain-language prompts. The AI will handle all the technical details.

    Can I build course builder apps for free?

    Yes, you can! Base44 allows you to build and deploy course builder apps for free. For additional features like custom domains and integrations, a Builder or higher plan is required.

    Can I build course builder apps without coding experience?

    Definitely! Base44 is designed to build full-stack apps without coding. It transforms your plain-language prompts into a live app instantly.

    Which integrations can I add to my course builder apps?

    With a Builder or higher plan, you can add external tools to your course builder apps through the catalog or AI chat. Your API keys are stored securely as secrets.

    How do I publish my app?

    Publishing your app is easy with Base44. Every app is hosted automatically with instant sharing. For custom domains, a Builder+ plan is needed.

    Can I customize my course builder app after it's created?

    Yes, you can! With Base44, you can refine your course builder app through AI chat or Visual Edit, adding pages, workflows, and design tweaks as needed.

    So, what are we building?

    Get started

    Base44 is the AI-powered platform that lets users build fully functioning apps in minutes. Using nothing but natural language, Base44 enables anyone to turn their words into productivity apps, back-office tools, customer portals, or complete enterprise products that are ready to use—no integrations required.
